data.title: Staked STRK Tokens Surpass 200 Million, Raising Centralization Concerns
data.description: According to PANews, blockchain data from Voyager reveals that the number of staked STRK tokens has exceeded 200 million, reaching 201,737,217.135 tokens. This figure represents 7.35% of the current circulating supply of 2,743,505,868 tokens. The top three staking validator clients are Argent, Karnot, and AVNU, collectively accounting for 58% of the staked tokens, which poses a potential centralization risk.

data.title: GMGN Lianchuang: Solana MEV facility has problems, users are advised to control slippage and transaction amounts
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News GMGN co-founder @haze0x posted on the X platform: "There is a problem with the mev facility on the sol chain, and the clamp is starting to run rampant. Everyone should pay attention to controlling slippage. Control the amount of each transaction."

data.title: Coinbase Announces 1,000 New Jobs While Attending White House Crypto Summit
data.description:
